name: decision-to-policy calibration
false_positive: May describe a proposed, local, or never-executed workflow.

name: durable professional profile
false_positive: Persistence does not establish provider custody or reuse.

name: remote read-to-handoff boundary
rationale: Finds potential remote sources and bounded sinks.
false_positive: Declarations do not establish credentials, traffic, or payload content.

name: hosted skill or instruction upload
false_positive: Upload does not establish retention, training, or cross-customer use.

name: untrusted-reader authority separation
false_positive: Prompt instructions may not be technically enforced.

name: skill supply-chain gate
rationale: Finds acquisition, review, and installation boundaries.
false_positive: A documented gate may be optional, bypassable, or not executed.
